title: dactylorhiza × aschersoniana
intro: Dactylorhiza × aschersoniana is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza incarnata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza × aschersoniana include its potential to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
